sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Taiwan's Foundry Model: The Global Chip Industry's Central Hub in 2026 - News and Statistics
feed.summary: As of early 2026, Taiwan remains the central hub for advanced semiconductor manufacturing, dominating the production of sophisticated logic chips crucial for AI systems and military hardware. This dominance, originating from a strategic shift decades ago with the pure-play foundry model, makes Taiwan an indispensable economic node but also a potential single point of failure for global supply chains. While the island faces physical constraints like resource intensity and skilled labor shortages, and geopolitical risks, TSMC is diversifying production geographically, though the most advanced research and manufacturing will stay in Taiwan.

feed.title: Team Inc. (TISI) Reports Q4 and Annual Financial Losses - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Team Inc. (TISI) has reported financial losses for both its fourth quarter and the full fiscal year. The industrial services firm experienced a net loss of $3.8 million in Q4, with adjusted per-share losses of $1.21, on revenues of $224.8 million. For the entire fiscal year, the company's net loss was $49.2 million, or $11.70 per share, with total revenues reaching $896.5 million.

feed.title: Travel + Leisure (TNL) Boosts Quarterly Dividend by 7%
feed.summary: Travel + Leisure Co. (TNL) has announced a 7% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.60 per share, payable on March 31, 2026. While the company shows solid revenue growth and a strong liquidity position, it faces financial strength challenges due to high debt and a mixed valuation picture, suggesting a need for careful investor consideration despite cautiously optimistic analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Lyell Immunopharma 2025 Financial Results: Annual Loss of $274.4M - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Lyell Immunopharma reported a net loss of $140.7 million for the final quarter of 2025, with revenue totaling $6,000. For the full fiscal year 2025, the company announced an annual net loss of $274.4 million and annual revenue of $36,000. This financial update includes a comprehensive report on the antisera industry in the United States, detailing market dynamics, trade flows, and forecasts to 2035.

feed.title: Turtle Beach Q4 2025 Results: Profit of $17.6M, Revenue Below Forecast - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Turtle Beach Corp reported a Q4 2025 profit of $17.6 million ($0.87 per share, or $0.89 adjusted), falling short of analyst expectations of $1.12 per share. The company's revenue of $118.8 million also missed forecasts of $143.1 million. For the full year, Turtle Beach announced a profit of $15.7 million ($0.77 per share) on $319.9 million in revenue, and provided future revenue guidance of $335 million to $355 million.

feed.title: Russell 2000 Analysis: 3 Stocks with Stagnant Sales and Operational Challenges - News and Statistics
feed.summary: This article analyzes three Russell 2000 companies—Lindsay Corporation, ICU Medical, Inc., and Enact Holdings, Inc.—that are experiencing stagnant sales and operational challenges. Lindsay faces flat sales and diminishing returns on capital, ICU Medical struggles with stagnant sales, a projected decline, and increased capital intensity, and Enact Holdings has seen stagnant net premiums and lagging EPS growth. The report highlights these firms due to their common pattern of sales stagnation and specific cyclical headwinds.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Akash Palkhiwala Sells 2,500 Shares of Qualcomm In
feed.summary: Akash Palkhiwala, Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer & Chief Operating Officer of Qualcomm Technologies, Inc., sold 2,500 shares of Qualcomm Inc (QCOM) on March 12, 2026. This transaction follows a pattern of insider selling at Qualcomm, with 30 insider sells and 0 buys in the past year. The stock is currently trading at $132.33, and GuruFocus classifies it as modestly undervalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.75.

feed.title: UniFirst says commitment to Owensboro remains strong as local leaders weigh in on Cintas acquisition
feed.summary: UniFirst has stated its commitment to Owensboro remains strong despite the announcement of its acquisition by Cintas Corp. for $5.5 billion. Local leaders, including Mayor Tom Watson and Daviess County Judge-Executive Charlie Castlen, are closely monitoring the situation, expressing hope that UniFirst's recent $28 million expansion in Owensboro will secure the facility's future and that Cintas will continue to be a strong corporate citizen in the community. The acquisition is pending shareholder and regulatory approvals and is expected to close in late 2026, with both companies operating independently until then.

feed.title: Insider Sell: J.e.b. Bolen Sells 7,634 Shares of EQT Corp (EQT)
feed.summary: J.e.b. Bolen, Executive Vice President of Operations at EQT Production Company, sold 7,634 shares of EQT Corp (EQT) on March 12, 2026. This sale increases his total sales over the past year to 9,056 shares, with no purchases. EQT Corp, a natural gas production company, is currently considered significantly overvalued based on its GuruFocus Value, trading at $64.35 against a GF Value of $47.89.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Stock Surges 30% YTD Amid Texas Move and Analyst Upgrades
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation's stock has rallied nearly 30% year-to-date, reaching $156 per share, driven by strategic shifts like reincorporating in Texas after a challenging 2025. The company's resilience is further highlighted by executive compensation cuts, successful navigation of Middle East supply disruptions, and analyst upgrades. Key drivers include strong upstream performance in the Permian and Guyana, cost discipline, and robust free cash flow generation for buybacks and dividends.

feed.title: Devon Energy Corp Stock (ISIN: US2521311074) Gains Momentum Amid Oil Price Recovery
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corp stock (ISIN: US2521311074) rose 0.71% to $46.28 on March 13, 2026, driven by positive analyst upgrades and strong Q3 results, as recovering crude prices enhance upstream profitability. The company's focus on high-return drilling in the Delaware Basin and Eagle Ford, coupled with a fixed-plus-variable dividend framework, appeals to European investors seeking exposure to US energy and a hedge against European gas supply risks. Analysts maintain bullish sentiment with raised price targets, highlighting Devon's operational resilience and disciplined capital allocation.

feed.title: Live Nation, Ticketmaster trial to resume after 7 states join a Justice Department settlement
feed.summary: More than 30 states will resume their antitrust trial against Live Nation and Ticketmaster after negotiations failed to get more states to join a Justice Department settlement. Seven states have agreed to settle with Live Nation, while the remaining 32 states plan to continue their case, arguing the companies stifle competition and inflate prices. A judge ruled the trial would proceed and admitted evidence against Live Nation's objections, including an employee's comments about "outrageous" VIP charges.

feed.title: Insider Sell Alert: Masatoshi Koide Sells Shares of Aflac Inc (A
feed.summary: Masatoshi Koide, President and Representative Director of ALIJ, sold 15,431 shares of Aflac Inc (AFL) on March 11, 2026, reducing his holdings to 86,422 shares. Over the past year, Aflac has seen 24 insider sells and zero insider buys. The stock is currently trading at $109.93, making it modestly overvalued based on its GF Value of $97.92.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Duncan Mckechnie Sells Shares of Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc (VRTX)
feed.summary: Duncan Mckechnie, Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer at Vertex Pharmaceuticals Inc (VRTX), sold 2,633 shares of the company on March 11, 2026, reducing his holding to 12,489 shares. Over the past year, Mckechnie has sold a total of 9,980 shares and made no purchases. On the day of the sale, VRTX shares traded at $498.42, and the company is considered fairly valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.02.

feed.title: Pentair plc Stock Slips on Cautious 2026 Outlook Despite Record 2025 Earnings
feed.summary: Pentair plc's stock has declined by approximately 10% recently, despite reporting record Q4 2025 earnings, due to a cautious 2026 outlook that fell short of analyst expectations. The company projected 2026 EPS of USD 5.250-5.400, which, while representing growth, indicated a moderation in demand influenced by macro headwinds and customer hesitations in capital deployment. The market reaction signals investor concerns about the company's ability to maintain momentum and achieve operating leverage in the current year, amid a CFO transition and institutional selling.

feed.title: CSX announces railroad closures in Sumter County
feed.summary: CSX Transportation will perform emergency track repairs in Pinewood and Sumter, South Carolina, from March 18-20. The repairs are due to rail defects identified on Fulton Manning Road in Pinewood and Kingsbury Road in Sumter, which will necessitate total closures of these roadways.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Beats Estimates Amid Housing Momentum: What This Means for Investors
feed.summary: D.R. Horton reported stronger-than-expected earnings but experienced a year-over-year revenue decline, leading to analyst caution and a decrease in stock value. Despite solid financial health and a leading market position, the company faces headwinds from persistent inflation and an uncertain housing market. Investors are advised to exercise caution due to negative technical indicators and a balanced analyst consensus.

feed.title: Archer-Daniels-Midland Rose 7% This Week. Here’s Where the Stock Could Head in 2026
feed.summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) stock rose 7% this week to nearly $72, driven by stabilizing agricultural commodity markets and anticipation of its next earnings report. The increase reflects improving fundamentals in ADM's oilseed processing business due to strong soybean meal demand and positive management outlook. A valuation model suggests an $81 target price, implying an 11% upside, contingent on processing margin recovery, growth in the Nutrition segment, and favorable global grain trade activity.

feed.title: Why Is the SPY ETF Down Today, 3/13/2026?
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) was down 0.57% today, March 13, 2026, driven by investor concerns over escalating geopolitical conflict and its economic implications. Despite recent net outflows, retail sentiment remains positive, and hedge funds have increased their holdings. TipRanks' ETF analyst consensus gives SPY a "Moderate Buy" rating with an implied upside potential of 27.3%.

feed.title: Avery Dennison Corp Director Sells 33,000 Shares
feed.summary: Mitchell R Butier, a Director at Avery Dennison Corp, sold 33,000 shares of common stock for over $5.7 million through two transactions on March 11 and 12, 2026. The shares were sold at weighted average prices between $169.7064 and $174.5326. Following these sales, Butier directly owns 198,147 shares and indirectly holds 4,312 shares via a Savings Plan.

feed.title: Acadia Healthcare Refreshes Board With Finance Veteran Appointment
feed.summary: Acadia Healthcare (ACHC) announced the appointment of Daniel Cancelmi, a veteran healthcare finance executive and former CFO of Tenet Healthcare, to its board of directors, effective immediately. This move is part of the company's planned board transition, as director Wade D. Miquelon will retire at the 2026 annual meeting. The refreshed board aims to enhance financial and strategic oversight to support disciplined growth and shareholder value, despite TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rating ACHC as "Neutral" due to recent financial quality concerns.

feed.title: Ernexa Therapeutics 2025 10-K: $0.0M Revenue, Net Loss $(14.08)M
feed.summary: Ernexa Therapeutics reported zero revenue in 2025, a significant drop from $0.582 million in 2024, resulting in a net loss of $(14.08) million, an improvement from the prior year's $(44.539) million loss. The company focused on preclinical development, secured financing through private placements and public offerings, and reduced operating expenses to extend its financial runway. These efforts include optimizing facilities and implementing corporate governance changes like a reverse stock split.

feed.title: Vuzix 2025 Financials: Q4 Loss of $8.6M, Annual Revenue $6.3M - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Vuzix Corp. announced its financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, reporting a quarterly loss of $8.6 million on revenue of $2.2 million. For the entire fiscal year, the wearable device manufacturer posted an annual loss of $32.3 million with total revenues of $6.3 million.

feed.title: New Chipotle restaurant to open in State College
feed.summary: A new Chipotle Mexican Grill featuring a drive-thru pick-up lane is set to open in State College next Thursday on South Atherton Street. This will be the first Chipotle in State College with this feature and the third in Centre County. While a soft opening for invitees is scheduled for Wednesday, the restaurant will open to the public on Thursday, operating daily from 10:45 a.m. to 10 p.m.

feed.title: Chen Jesse, Axt Inc director, sells $1.35 million in AXTI stock
feed.summary: AXT INC (NASDAQ:AXTI) director Chen Jesse sold 29,000 shares of common stock for a total of $1.35 million across two transactions on March 10 and 11, 2026. The sales occurred while the stock was trading near its 52-week high. This comes amidst a revised fourth-quarter revenue forecast for AXT due to export permit issues, and mixed analyst ratings including a price target raise from Craig-Hallum and a downgrade from B.Riley.

feed.title: Behavioral Patterns of DCMT and Institutional Flows
feed.summary: This article analyzes Doubleline Commodity Strategy Etf (DCMT) with AI-generated signals and institutional trading strategies. It highlights strong near and mid-term sentiment, details specific entry/target/stop-loss points for position, momentum breakout, and risk hedging strategies, and provides multi-timeframe signal analysis with support and resistance levels.

feed.title: Emerald Holding, Inc. (NYSE:EEX) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.02
feed.summary: Emerald Holding, Inc. (NYSE:EEX) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.015 per share, payable on April 2nd to shareholders of record as of March 23rd, representing a 1.5% yield. This comes despite the company missing its earnings per share consensus, reporting a loss of $0.15 compared to an estimated $0.04. The dividend appears covered by earnings, though the company has modestly decreased its dividend payments over the past three years.

feed.title: Insulet Corporation (PODD) Shareholders Who Lost Money – Contact Law Offices of Howard G. Smith About Securities Fraud Investigation
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Howard G. Smith announced an investigation into Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ: PODD) for potential federal securities law violations. This follows Insulet's disclosure of a voluntary Medical Device Correction for specific Omnipod® 5 Pods due to a manufacturing issue, which caused the company's stock price to drop by 6.9%. The firm is encouraging shareholders who suffered losses to contact them to discuss their legal rights and potential claims.

feed.title: Hawley questions top fertilizer companies on price spikes
feed.summary: U.S. Senator Josh Hawley of Missouri has sent letters to five major fertilizer producers—CF Industries, Mosaic Company, Koch Fertilizer, Nutrien, and Yara International—to inquire about recent price increases. He is investigating potential price gouging or market manipulation amidst the Iran conflict, urging transparency from these companies by the end of March. Hawley, a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, emphasizes that U.S. farmers deserve fair treatment and has also contacted the U.S. Attorney General regarding these concerns.

feed.title: Assessing Ingersoll Rand (IR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: This article analyzes Ingersoll Rand's (IR) valuation following recent share price weakness, which saw declines across daily, weekly, and monthly periods. Despite short-term pressure, the stock shows positive returns over longer periods. Simply Wall St suggests IR is modestly undervalued with a fair value of $88.30 against its current price of $81.17, driven by strong fundamentals like recurring revenue streams, but cautions about its high P/E ratio compared to the industry.

feed.summary: This page provides access to Henry Schein, Inc. (HSIC) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K reports, along with AI-powered summaries to help investors understand complex disclosures. feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Ross Stores (ROST) After A 72% One-Year Surge?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Ross Stores (ROST) after its significant 72% stock surge over the last year, questioning if it's still a reasonable investment. Using discounted cash flow (DCF) and price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio analyses, Simply Wall St concludes that Ross Stores appears overvalued, suggesting potential buyers might be paying too much based on future cash flow predictions and current earnings multiples compared to industry averages and a proprietary "Fair Ratio." The article encourages investors to explore different valuation narratives on their community platform.

feed.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated Stock (ISIN: US7475251036) Slides Amid Analyst Downgrades and China Exposure Concerns
feed.summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated stock (QCOM) dropped 2.21% to $131.15 on March 12, 2026, due to a Bank of America downgrade and broader semiconductor sector weakness, with the semiconductor giant facing headwinds from slowing smartphone demand and significant exposure to China. Despite this, analysts maintain an "Accumulate" consensus with a $159.15 target, signaling 21% upside potential, driven by QUALCOMM's diversification into automotive and AI edge computing. The stock is currently undervalued compared to historical averages, but investors need to monitor geopolitical risks and supply chain constraints.

feed.title: FIS Insider Buying And Mizuho Win Highlight Higher Value Banking Focus
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) CEO Stephanie Ferris recently increased her stake in the company through share purchases. This comes as FIS secured an agreement with Mizuho Financial Group for its Balance Sheet Manager solution, aimed at advanced balance sheet automation and regulatory support, particularly for IFRS 9 implementation in Japan. These developments highlight FIS's strategy to focus on high-value, complex banking workflows and compliance solutions, despite a challenging period for its stock performance.

feed.title: Moderna (MRNA) Valuation Check After Sharp Multi‑Month Share Price Rebound
feed.summary: Moderna (MRNA) has experienced a significant share price rebound, rising 30% in the last month and 78% in three months. While many investors see it as undervalued with a fair value of $175 per share, Simply Wall St's DCF model suggests it is overvalued at $27.59 compared to its current price of $52.56. The article highlights the conflicting valuations, given Moderna's complex drug pipeline and current net losses, and advises investors to consider both the potential and the risks.

feed.title: Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) Declares Dividend Increase - $0.53 Per Share
feed.summary: Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) has announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.53 per share, payable on June 11 to shareholders of record on May 21. This represents a 15.2% increase from the previous dividend of $0.46 and an annualized dividend of $1.84, with a current yield of approximately 0.6%. The company's dividend appears sustainable, supported by a low payout ratio of 18.2% and consistent dividend raises over the past eight years, alongside strong recent earnings and revenue performance.

feed.title: Boeing is repairing 25 Max jets after wire flaw halts deliveries
feed.summary: Boeing is currently repairing wiring issues in up to 25 undelivered 737 Max jets, causing disruptions in near-term deliveries. While this has slowed March deliveries significantly compared to February, the company anticipates the impact might not be as extensive as initially feared. This latest quality flaw has raised concern among investors, as consistent 737 deliveries are key to Boeing's financial recovery.

feed.title: DevvStream 10-Q: $8,143 Revenue, $(0.98) EPS on Six‑Month Net Loss of $(3.94M)
feed.summary: DevvStream reported a six-month net loss of $3.94 million and a loss per share of $(0.98) on minimal operating revenue of $8,143, as detailed in its latest 10-Q filing. The company is in an early stage of commercial activity, with operating expenses driving a $4.42 million operating loss, but it has initiated strategic shifts into digital treasury, crypto asset deployment, and continues expansion in carbon markets.

feed.title: Is Entergy Stock Outperforming the Dow?
feed.summary: Entergy Corporation (ETR) has seen significant outperformance against the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) over the past three months, year-to-date, and over the past year. The energy company, with a market capitalization of $47.3 billion, is focusing on strategic transformation towards grid resilience and clean energy, aiming for net-zero carbon emissions by 2050, and has recently secured major service agreements with data center operators. Despite a decline in Q4 adjusted EPS, the company met analyst estimates, and analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" consensus rating with a favorable price target.

feed.title: Simeon Palios Discloses Investment at Diana Shipping Inc. with 5.7% Stake
feed.summary: Simeon Palios, a director of Diana Shipping Inc. (DSX), has disclosed a 5.7% stake in the company, held indirectly through Taracan Investments S.A. and Limon Compania Financiera S.A. This investment, formalized with a Schedule 13D filing on March 13, 2026, includes a recent grant of 1,694,227 shares to Taracan. Palios, a seasoned Greek shipping executive, is positioned to influence the company's strategy and governance, maintaining flexibility to adjust his holdings and potentially collaborate with other shareholders to enhance shareholder value.

feed.title: Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp expected to post a loss of 60 cents a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp (DFLI) is anticipated to report a loss of 60 cents per share in its upcoming earnings. This earnings preview provides an outlook on the company's financial performance. The information is provided by Refinitiv and Reuters.

feed.title: Research Alert: CFRA Lowers Opinion On Shares Of Cf Industries Holdings, Inc. To Sell From Hold
feed.summary: CFRA has lowered its opinion on shares of Cf Industries Holdings, Inc. from "Hold" to "Sell". The article also briefly mentions Unity Software's fourth-quarter financial results, noting a revenue increase of 35% year-over-year to $609 million and a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share. However, the primary focus of the headline is on CFRA's rating change for Cf Industries.

feed.title: Dermata Therapeutics Inc expected to post a loss of $1.54 a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Dermata Therapeutics Inc. (DRMA) is projected to report a loss of $1.54 per share. This earnings preview provides a brief financial outlook for the company, indicating expectations for its upcoming earnings announcement. The information is sourced from Refinitiv via Reuters.

feed.title: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) Trading Up 1.3% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) saw its stock trade up 1.3% recently, influenced by strategic collaborations with BE Semiconductor Industries and IBM for advanced-packaging and sub-1nm logic technologies, respectively. The company reported strong financial results, beating quarterly estimates with increased revenue and EPS, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $245.35. Despite positive catalysts and analyst support, the stock carries a high valuation with a P/E of 43.48 and has seen recent insider selling, leading to some analyst warnings about potential re-rating or consolidation.

feed.title: Garmin Ltd. stock (ISIN: CH0114405324) surges past $236 on strong Q4 earnings and raised 2026 guidan
feed.summary: Garmin Ltd.'s stock surged past $236 after reporting strong Q4 earnings, beating estimates by 17%, and raising its 2026 EPS guidance to $9.35. The company's performance reflects robust demand for premium wearables and aviation products, alongside efficient capital management. While the stock has seen significant growth, analysts are divided on its future trajectory with some suggesting it's currently trading at fair value.

feed.title: Hershey Company stock (ISIN: US4278661081) eyes spring momentum as cocoa costs stabilize
feed.summary: Hershey Company (US4278661081) is navigating cost inflation and brand resilience, with tentative signs of stabilizing cocoa prices offering potential relief to its margins. The company employs a two-pronged strategy of selective price increases and innovation in premium segments, facing critical execution challenges regarding pricing power and consumer elasticity during spring seasonality. European investors are closely watching the company's performance, as successful execution in controlling costs and maintaining demand will be crucial for its near-term outlook and stock performance.

feed.title: Conagra Invests $220M in Manufacturing, Expands Job Opportunities
feed.summary: Conagra Brands (CAG) is investing $220 million to expand its manufacturing facility in Fayetteville, Arkansas, creating over 100 new jobs and boosting production capacity. Despite recent strategic initiatives and reaffirmed guidance, the company faces financial challenges, including negative profit margins and a significant debt load. Analysts maintain a neutral sentiment, with cautious optimism surrounding its efforts to improve efficiency and free cash flow.

feed.title: Apple Reduces Chinese App Store Fees Without the EU Drama
feed.summary: Apple has announced a reduction in App Store commission rates for developers in China, effective March 15, 2026, lowering the standard rate to 25% and discounted rates to 12%. This move, which contrasts sharply with Apple's resistance to the EU's Digital Markets Act, is speculated to be driven by China's unique geopolitical influence and Apple's manufacturing ties, rather than just market size. The article compares this decision with previous concessions made in South Korea and Japan, highlighting the varied approaches Apple takes in different regulatory environments.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NOW) CEO Warns of Rising Unemployment Due to AI
feed.summary: ServiceNow's CEO, Bill McDermott, has warned that AI could significantly increase unemployment rates for young college graduates, potentially reaching the mid-30% range due to AI agents taking over tasks. Despite this concern, ServiceNow Inc. (NOW) demonstrates strong financial performance with robust revenue growth, high gross margins, and a healthy balance sheet. However, the company faces challenges in capital utilization and its valuation appears premium compared to industry averages, though analyst sentiment remains positive.
